name: Chicken Scallopine- Dgp
recipeInstructions:
1. Bone and pound the chicken breasts.
2. In a bowl, mix flour, salt, and pepper.
3. Dip the cutlets in the mixture and press firmly to coat.
4. Shake off excess coating.
5. Chill the coated cutlets.
6. In a large skillet, heat butter until it sizzles.
7. Saute' the cutlets, 3 or 4 at a time, for 2-3 minutes per side.
8. Drain on paper towels and keep warm until all are cooked.
9. Stir Lemon juice and Wine into the drippings.
10. Heat without boiling.
11. Add Capers.
12. Spoon pan juices over the cutlets on the serving platter.
13. Sprinkle with chopped parsley.
14. This dish tastes especially good served with Fettucine and garnished with slice lemon twists and watercress.
